seoTitle: How to Merge Boards on Monday.com (2026 Guide)
metaDescription: Learn to consolidate Monday.com boards using Connect Boards, Mirror columns, and bulk item transfers without losing task history.
intro: Fragmented boards make it hard to see the whole picture across projects. This guide explains the two ways to merge data in Monday.com: relationally linking boards with Connect Boards and Mirror columns, or physically moving items into a single master board. You'll learn how to choose the right approach and avoid losing task history along the way.

steps.heading: Decide between linking and moving
steps.body: Understand the difference between relationally linking boards versus physically consolidating items into one master board before you start.

steps.heading: Add a Connect Boards column
steps.body: Build a dynamic relationship between two separate datasets by adding a Connect Boards column to your board.

steps.heading: Pull live data with Mirror columns
steps.body: Use Mirror columns to pull real-time data from a secondary board directly into your primary master view.

steps.heading: Bulk-select and move items
steps.body: Select multiple items and use the "Move to Board" feature to physically consolidate project groups into one board.

steps.heading: Map column properties carefully
steps.body: During a bulk transfer, map custom column types like Status, Numbers, and People correctly to prevent data loss.

steps.heading: Build a multi-board dashboard
steps.body: Use the Multi-Board Dashboard layout to visually merge up to 50 boards into a single unified reporting screen.

faq.question: What's the difference between merging and connecting boards?
faq.answer: Connecting boards relationally links two datasets without moving anything, while physically merging uses "Move to Board" to consolidate items into a single board.

faq.question: Will I lose task history when I merge boards?
faq.answer: Mapping column properties and field types correctly during a bulk transfer is designed to prevent loss of task history.

faq.question: How many boards can I combine into one dashboard view?
faq.answer: The Multi-Board Dashboard layout supports merging up to 50 boards into a single unified reporting screen.

faq.question: Can I undo a board merge if something goes wrong?
faq.answer: The tutorial doesn't cover a specific undo process for merges, so it's worth reviewing Monday.com's activity log and recycle bin options before performing a large bulk move.
